hero_subtitle: Where luxury meets the sea. Your private paradise in Guriú.
hero_whatsapp_msg: Hello! I'd like to know more about Yara Floating Villa in Guriú.
about_text1: Yara Floating Villa is the only floating villa set on the calm waters of Guriú, surrounded by sand dunes and untouched nature. Here, luxury meets the sea in a sustainable way — fully powered by solar energy.
about_text2: Imagine launching your kitesurf right from your doorstep in some of the best winds in the world. With high-speed Starlink Wi-Fi on board, you stay connected while living a unique and secluded experience.
about_list1: Located in Guriú, steps from the beach
amenities_subtitle: Everything you need for a total immersion in nature
amenity2_desc: The entire boat is powered by clean, renewable energy.
amenity3_desc: Delicious continental breakfast included in your stay.
amenity4_desc: Free transport all day wherever you need.
amenity5_desc: Launch from your door and on-demand lessons for all levels.
amenity6_desc: On-board chef service available upon request.
amenity8_desc: Dive into the crystal-clear waters surrounding the villa.
gallery_subtitle: Explore every detail of your floating retreat in Guriú
testimonials_title: What people are saying about us
review1_text: Our stay was wonderful! For those who enjoy something different and direct contact with nature. A paradise!!!
review2_text: Loved staying at Yara Floating Villa! Very welcoming and proactive staff. Very peaceful, even being in the middle of the ocean, you don't feel the movement of the sea...
review3_text: If you really want an immersive experience, to disconnect and feel like you're on a desert island, this is the ideal place for you...
review4_text: We had a very unique stay at the floating villa in Guriú! The villa is located among beautiful surroundings. Every day we could watch the sunset beautifully. It was a peaceful place...
booking_desc: We don't have automatic bookings because each stay is unique. Fill in the details below and speak directly with the owner on WhatsApp to confirm your reservation.
booking_access: We cross the river to pick you up with our own boat.
booking_note: The booking will be completed directly with the owner.
footer_about: Sustainable luxury experience on the water. Your floating home in paradise.
